title: Don't fear AI; it's only aid, not substitute: CJI Surya Kant
description: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant advised judicial officers to use Artificial Intelligence carefully. He stressed that AI should assist, not replace, human judgment in courts. Judges must remain independent and not be influenced by technology. AI offers efficiency gains but has limitations. Accuracy and authenticity are paramount. Justice remains a human endeavour.
content:
Synopsis

title: Balancing Act: Judiciary Navigates AI Integration
description: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant emphasizes the need for a balanced approach to integrating artificial intelligence in the judiciary. At a state-level conference, he highlighted AI's potential to enhance efficiency but cautioned against over-reliance, underscoring the irreplaceable human element in judicial decision-making.
content: At the 22nd biennial state-level conference of judicial officers, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant advocated for a nuanced integration of artificial intelligence in the judiciary. He urged judicial officers to embrace AI tools as aids rather than su... [757 chars]

title: Sandra Bullock Advocates for Creative Use of AI in Hollywood
description: Oscar-winner Sandra Bullock believes Hollywood should embrace artificial intelligence creatively. While acknowledging potential misuse, she advocates for understanding AI as an ally. Bullock's comments came after fan-made AI trailers of her film 'Practical Magic 2,' sparking conversations about AI's role in the film industry.
content: Oscar-winning actor Sandra Bullock has voiced her support for integrating artificial intelligence into Hollywood in a constructive manner. Speaking at the CNBC Changemakers Summit, she emphasized the industry's need to approach AI as a creative ally.... [571 chars]

content: Pope Leo XIV used a speech to students and teachers in Cameroon's capital Yaoundé on Friday to deliver his sharpest warning yet about artificial intelligence, saying the technology risked replacing reality itself with simulation and that the conseque... [2123 chars]

title: AI To Become Core In Punjab Schools As PSEB Reforms Curriculum & Links Learning Outcomes To Board Certificates
description: Punjab will integrate Artificial Intelligence as a core component of school education, with computer science learning outcomes reflected in board certificates, PSEB announced. At a national AI conference, officials outlined a roadmap to modernise education, boost innovation, and prepare students for a technology-driven future while emphasising ethical AI use and workforce readiness.
content:
Chandigarh: Artificial Intelligence will be integrated and form a core component of Punjab school education, with learning outcomes in computer science to reflect on certificates, the state's school education board announced on Friday.
The announceme... [1925 chars]

title: If first word is ‘artificial,’ can we call it ‘intelligence’?
description: A number of Globe stories on AI, from deepfake porn roiling schools to chatbots invading the human writing process, stirred readers to share their thoughts.
content: Of course, marvels from MRIs to personal computers have certainly enhanced our lives. But too often technology, now supercharged with AI, also seduces us with convenience while sowing doubt about perception itself. Any reporting our president doesn’t... [5237 chars]

title: Cerritos teen invents AI-powered device to help detect and treat crossed eyes
description: An eighth grader from Cerritos has developed an artificial intelligence-powered wearable device designed to help people with strabismus.
content:
An eighth grader from Cerritos has developed an artificial intelligence-powered wearable device designed to help people with strabismus, commonly known as crossed eyes, by detecting eye drift in real time.

title: White House chief Of Staff Meets Anthropic CEO Over New AI Technology
description: The White House has begun discussions with leading AI developers as officials assess the potential risks and benefits of powerful new artificial intelligence systems.
content:
Susie Wiles met with Dario Amodei to discuss the artificial intelligence company’s latest technology, as the U.S. government increasingly examines the national security and economic implications of advanced AI systems.
